title: Custom Randomizer - Ultimate
body:
# RandomizerUltimate **RandomizerUltimate** is a Minecraft plugin for Spigot/Paper that randomizes drops **per player**. Each player has their own `.yml` file with fully randomized block and mob drops. Players can have unique drops, and files can be edited manually or copied to other players. --- ## Features - Per-player randomizer - Randomizes **all Minecraft blocks and items**, including barriers and command blocks - Player files `.yml` are generated automatically - `/randomizer start` → creates a new randomizer and overwrites the current player file - `/randomizer stop` → stops the randomizer and saves the file - `/randomizer copy ` → copies the drops from one player to another - `/randomizer reload` → reloads the current player file - Tab completion for all commands and player names --- ## Installation 1. Compatible with **Minecraft 1.18+** and Spigot/Paper servers 2. Place the `.jar` file in the `plugins/` folder 3. Start the server → the plugin will create the `plugins/RandomizerUltimate/` folder automatically 4. Optionally edit `config.yml` for global settings like messages and prefix --- ## Commands | Command | Description | |---------|-------------| | `/randomizer ` | Start the randomizer for a player | | `/randomizer start` | Creates a new randomizer and overwrites the player's current drops | | `/randomizer stop` | Stops the randomizer and saves the player's file | | `/randomizer copy ` | Copies the drops from one player to another | | `/randomizer reload` | Reloads the player's `.yml` file | --- ## Player File (`.yml`) Each player has their own file located in the plugin folder. Example format:
.yml ```yaml drops: STONE: DIAMOND DIRT: COAL ZOMBIE_HEAD: GOLD_INGOT COMMAND_BLOCK: BARRIER ```
Can be manually edited Changes take effect after **/randomizer reload** is used
config.yml ```yaml settings: default-enabled: false prefix: "&6[Randomizer]" messages: started: "&aRandomizer started for %player%" stopped: "&cRandomizer stopped for %player%" copied: "&eRandomizer copied from %from% to %to%" player-not-found: "&cPlayer not found!" usage: "&cUsage: /randomizer [start|stop|copy |reload]" ```
usage default-enabled: Automatically start the randomizer when a player joins
prefix: Chat message prefix
messages: Customize messages using placeholders %player%, %from%, %to%
